title: HOHOHO!
description: I'm a tough boy! Treat me like one of your ITEMS!
body:
Adds lancer and his very own crafting recipe!

SAY HELLO TO LANCER! This wonderful little boy has leaps and bounds of utility, such as...
- making a splat sound
- being sorta expensive to craft for no reason
- being fireproof
- making you cooler than all of your friends!

By using 8 diamonds and a Jukebox, you can have your very own, one of a kind lancer! Just hit that good ol' right click button and he'll make your day!

Lancer! Buy today! (terms and conditions do not apply he is lancer and this mod is very useless)

Credit to Toby Fox
